title: Remove Zoho Chat Bot Code from DataTools Pro
description: Remove all Zoho chat bot code snippets from the DataTools Pro application. The Zoho integration will be replaced with a better solution at a later time.
acceptance_criteria: All Zoho chat bot code snippets are removed from the codebase
No Zoho-related scripts or elements load in the application
No regressions in other chat or support features
ux_changes: Zoho chat widget no longer appears in the application UI.
implementation_notes: Straightforward removal of Zoho code snippets from templates/layouts.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed removal of Zoho code.
